description: A shimmering figure offers you a deal across the void...

choices.text: Pay 75 gold for a rare card.
Pay 50 gold for a common relic.
Leave.

description: An ancient altar pulses with eldritch light. What do you offer?

choices.text: Sacrifice 10 HP to gain 2 Strength for this combat.
Offer a card from your hand (remove it permanently).
Ignore the altar.

description: A rift in space tears open before you. Portals flicker with possibility.

choices.text: Reach through and grab something (gain a random relic, lose 15 HP).
Step through to find a shortcut (skip 1 floor).
Close the rift (gain 30 gold).

description: A mad scholar mutters formulae of the void. He offers his knowledge—for a price.

choices.text: Study with him (upgrade a card in your deck).
Ask about relics (gain a common relic for free).
Ignore him.

description: A well of glowing void energy stretches into eternity. Its power calls to you.

choices.text: Drink deeply (gain 20 max HP, lose 5 current HP).
Sip carefully (heal 15 HP).
Fill a vial (gain 1 potion).

description: A creature made of pure void writhes in chains. It pleads for release.

choices.text: Free it (gain a rare relic, it may return as an enemy later).
Destroy it (gain 50 gold, gain 10 max HP).
Leave it.

description: A mirror shows infinite reflections of yourself, each with a different path taken.

choices.text: Touch the mirror (copy a card in your hand, add it to your deck).
Smash it (remove a card from your deck).
Ignore it.

description: A disembodied voice speaks in frequencies that reshape reality. It offers a gift.

choices.text: Accept the blessing (upgrade a random card in your deck).
Ask for gold (gain 40 gold).
Demand healing (heal 25 HP).
Reject the blessing.
